'''Rego Mineral Company''' was a [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]] mining/prospecting corporation that existed towards the end of the [[Rise of the Empire era]]. They were perhaps best known as the discoverers of [[Altor 14]], in the year [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]]. In return for a trade agreement with the native [[Nuiwit]], the Rego Mineral Company gained rights to the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] mineral deposits.

{{Company-stub}}
